```{r Import libraries}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false

pak::pak("Brar/neoipcr@PartnerReport")
library(tidyverse, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(smplot2, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(scales, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(patchwork, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(gt, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(neoipcr, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
```

```{r Set up functions}
#| include: false

source("../common/helpers.R")

labels_bw <- function(x) {
  paste(
    format_integer(x),
    sR$gramm_abbreviation,
    sep = sR$unit_separator)
}
breaks_bw <- function(x) {
  pretty(
    x,
    as.integer(
      (as.integer(x[2]) + 1 - as.integer(x[1])) / 100)
    )
}
labels_wk <- function(x) {
  paste(
    format(
      as.integer(x / 7),
      big.mark = sR$digit_group_separator
      ),
    sR$week_abbreviation,
    sep = sR$unit_separator)
}
breaks_wk <- function(x) {
  pretty(
    x / 7,
    as.integer((as.integer(x[2] / 7) + 1 - as.integer(x[1] / 7)) / 2)
    ) * 7
}

```

```{r Initialise locale dependent information}
#| include: false

locale <- Sys.getenv("LC_ALL")
localeObj <- parse_locales(locale)[[1]]
invisible(Sys.setlocale(category = "LC_ALL", locale = locale))
invisible(Sys.setLanguage(localeObj$language))
if(is.null(localeObj$territory)){
  locale_gt <- localeObj$language
  locale_stringi <- localeObj$language
} else {
  locale_gt <- paste0(localeObj$language, "-", localeObj$territory)
  locale_stringi <- paste0(localeObj$language, "_", localeObj$territory)
}
options(`gt.locale` = locale_gt)

sR <- get_string_resources(localeObj)
```

```{r Importing data}
#| include: false

if(!exists("params")) params <- list()

if (!is.null(params$ReferenceDataFile)) {
  if (!file.exists(params$ReferenceDataFile))
    stop(sprintf("The file '%s' does not exist.", params$ReferenceDataFile))
  reference_data <- jsonlite::unserializeJSON(
    readChar(
        params$ReferenceDataFile,
        file.info(params$ReferenceDataFile)$size))
} else {
  reference_data <- suppressWarnings(import_dhis2(
    connection_options = get_connection_options(params$token),
    dataset_options = get_dataset_options(
      reportingPeriodFrom = params$reportingPeriodFrom,
      reportingPeriodTo = params$reportingPeriodTo,
      birthWeightFrom = params$birthWeightFrom,
      birthWeightTo = params$birthWeightTo,
      gestationWeeksFrom = params$gestationWeeksFrom,
      gestationWeeksTo = params$gestationWeeksTo,
      reportingCountries = params$reportingCountries,
      testUnitFilter = params$testUnitFilter,
      defaultPatientFilter = params$defaultPatientFilter,
      validationExceptionFile = params$validationExceptionFile))) |>
    neoipcr::calculate_reference_data()
}

```

```{r Preparing localised data}
#| include: false

dR <- list(
  creationTimestamp = format(
    lubridate::now("UTC"),
    format = "%x %X",
    tz = "UTC",
    usetz = TRUE),
  dataUpToTimestamp = format(
    reference_data$metadata$data_up_to,
    format = "%x %X",
    tz = "UTC",
    usetz = TRUE),
  analysisPeriod = paste(
    format(
      reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$surveillance_end_from,
      format = "%x"),
    format(
      min(
        lubridate::as_date(reference_data$metadata$data_up_to),
        reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$surveillance_end_to
        ),
      format = "%x"
      ),
    sep = " - "),
  countriesList = paste0(
    reference_data$metadata$countries |>
      as.character() |>
      get_localised_country_names() |>
      stringr::str_sort(locale = locale_stringi),
    collapse = ", "),
  birthweightFilter = if(
    is.null(reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$birth_weight_from) &&
    is.null(reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$birth_weight_to)) {
      sR$headerList$allBirthweights
    } else if(
      is.null(reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$birth_weight_from)) {
      paste0(
        c(
          "≤ ",
          format_integer(
            reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$birth_weight_to),
          " g"),
        collapse = "")
    } else if(
      is.null(reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$birth_weight_to)) {
      paste0(
        c(
          "≥ ",
          format_integer(
            reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$birth_weight_from),
          " g"),
        collapse = "")
    } else {
      paste0(
        c(
          format_integer(
            reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$birth_weight_from),
          " g - ",
          format_integer(
            reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$birth_weight_to),
          " g"),
        collapse = "")
    },
  gestationalAgeFilter = if(
    is.null(reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$gestational_age_from) &&
    is.null(reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$gestational_age_to)) {
      sR$headerList$allGestationalAges
    } else if(
      is.null(reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$gestational_age_from)) {
      paste0(
        c(
          "≤ ",
          format_integer(
            reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$gestational_age_to),
          " w"),
        collapse = "")
    } else if(
      is.null(reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$gestational_age_to)) {
      paste0(
        c(
          "≥ ",
          format_integer(
            reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$gestational_age_from),
          " w"),
        collapse = "")
    } else {
      paste0(
        c(
          format_integer(
            reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$gestational_age_from),
          " w - ",
          format_integer(
            reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$gestational_age_to),
          " w"),
        collapse = "")
    },
  numberOfDepartments = format_integer(reference_data$n_departments),
  numberOfPatients = format_integer(reference_data$n_patients$total),
  numberOfAdmissions = format_integer(reference_data$n_enrollments$total),
  sumOfPatientDays = format_integer(reference_data$n_patient_days$total),
  averageSurveillancePeriod = format(
    reference_data$n_patient_days$total / reference_data$n_patients$total,
    digits = 2,
    nsmall = 1,
    scientific = FALSE),
  numberOfSevereInfections = format_integer(
    reference_data$incidence_density_rate_table |>
      dplyr::filter(inf == "si") |>
      dplyr::pull("n")),
  averageSevereInfectionsPerPatient = format(
    (
      (reference_data$incidence_density_rate_table |>
         dplyr::filter(inf == "si") |>
         dplyr::pull("n")) /
        reference_data$n_patients$total),
    digits = 2,
    nsmall = 1,
    scientific = FALSE),
  numberOfInfectiousAgents = format_integer(
    reference_data$infectious_agent_detection_rate_per_agent_table |>
      dplyr::filter(group == "Total") |>
      dplyr::pull("n")),
  numberOfInfectionsWithAgent = format_integer(
    reference_data$infectious_agent_detection_rate_per_inf_type_table |>
      dplyr::filter(inf == "all") |>
      dplyr::pull("n")),
  overallNumberOfInfections = format_integer(
    reference_data$n_infections |>
      dplyr::filter(inf_type == "overall") |>
      dplyr::pull("total")),
  infectiousAgentDetectionRate = format(
    (
      (reference_data$infectious_agent_detection_rate_per_inf_type_table |>
         dplyr::filter(inf == "all") |>
         dplyr::pull("n")) /
        (
          reference_data$n_infections |>
            dplyr::filter(inf_type == "overall") |>
            dplyr::pull("total")
          )
      * 100
      ),
    digits = 2,
    nsmall = 1,
    scientific = FALSE),
  numberOfSurgicalDepartments = format_integer(
    reference_data$n_surgical_departments),
  proportionOfSurgicalDepartments = paste0(
    format(
      reference_data$n_surgical_departments /
        reference_data$n_departments *
        100,
      digits = 2,
      nsmall = 1,
      scientific = FALSE),
    sR$unit_separator,
    sR$percent_symbol,
    collapse = ""
  ),
  numberOfSurgicalProcedures = format_integer(
    reference_data$n_surgical_procedures |>
      dplyr::pull("total")
  ),
  numberOfSurgicalPatients = format_integer(
    reference_data$n_surgical_patients |>
      dplyr::pull("total")
  ),
  numberOfSurgicalProceduresPerPatient = format(
    reference_data$n_surgical_procedures |>
      dplyr::pull("total") /
    reference_data$n_surgical_patients |>
      dplyr::pull("total"),
      digits = 2,
      nsmall = 1,
      scientific = FALSE),
  numberOfSurgicalSiteInfections = format_integer(
    reference_data$n_infections |>
      dplyr::filter(inf_type == "ssi") |>
      dplyr::pull("total")
  )
)

```

```{r Set up NeoIPC layout}
#| include: false

NeoIPC_pallette <- c("#FF9015","#0083C1","#0D4F6C","#E6FAFC","#E0D3DE","#1F271B")
pal <- c(NeoIPC_pallette[5],NeoIPC_pallette[2],NeoIPC_pallette[6])

```
